items.title: Enzo Fernandez reacts after red card in Argentina's World Cup final loss to Spain
items.summary: Enzo Fernandez expressed pride in representing Argentina after their World Cup final defeat. He highlighted the team's commitment and effort over the final result. The midfielde...

items.title: Walker to take over from Farbrace as Sussex coach
items.summary: Sussex announce former Kent boss Matt Walker will replace Paul Farbrace as their head coach for the 2027 season.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Japan goalkeeper Okuma signs for Aston Villa
items.summary: Aston Villa announce the signing of 21-year-old Japan goalkeeper Akane Okuma.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
